ddls:
CREATE TABLE "battery_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the battery configuration */,
  "num_ebms" INTEGER /* Number of external battery modules (EBMs) in the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the configuration */,
  "internal_battery_model" TEXT /* Model of the internal battery used */,
  "ebm_model" TEXT /* Model of the external battery modules (EBMs) used */,
  "total_capacity_wh" REAL /* Total capacity of the configuration in watt-hours */,
  "max_power_output_w" REAL /* Maximum power output of the configuration in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data center was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data center information */,
  "total_power_capacity_kW" REAL /* Total power capacity of the data center in kilowatts */,
  "total_energy_consumption_kWh" REAL /* Total energy consumption of the data center in kilowatt-hours */,
  "maintenance_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_conditions" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load condition */,
  "load_watt" INTEGER /* Load in watts */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the load condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the load condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the load condition */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the load condition in minutes */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the load condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance test */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data center where the test was conducted */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery configuration used in the test */,
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the load condition of the test */,
  "performance_watt" REAL /* Performance in watts */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., lab, production) */,
  "test_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "test_notes_details" TEXT /* Additional detailed notes or observations about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_load_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_id") REFERENCES load_conditions ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES battery_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., efficiency, temperature) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., percent, degrees Celsius) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the configuration setting (e.g., volts, amps) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the configuration setting */,
  "setting_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., log, report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the readme file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the readme file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_readme_files_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "version_notes_details" TEXT /* Additional detailed notes or changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)
